figures.caption: Fig. 1: MolDA architecture overview. A hybrid graph encoder (GINE + TokenGT) produces structural representations, the Q-Former maps them into the language model token space, and LLaDA generates the response through iterative denoising with low-confidence remasking.
Table 1: Molecular understanding results on ChEBI-20 (Generation, Captioning) and MoleculeNet (Property Prediction). Best results are bolded, second best are underlined.
Table 2: Reaction prediction results on Mol-Instructions. Best results are bolded, second best are underlined.
